seasons.name: Kortmug
seasons.tagline: Two overlords carve up the Spirit Archipelago.

events.title: The Spirit Archipelago
events.text: Amon Toth's sorcery opens a new land near the Kambujan coast, the bracelets still binding even there.

events.title: Two Overlords
events.text: Thyri rules the East, Erik the West — both already grabbing land and imposing rival laws.

events.title: Kortmug Opens
events.text: The melting-pot hub takes shape, with the Inn, plots, and the new crafting basement rules.

seasons.name: Hindafjall — Thyri's Rule
seasons.tagline: A coup ends Erik's reign; the Mistress takes the throne.

events.title: The Coup
events.text: Thyri's envoy turns the Exiles against Erik. The battle for Hindafjall burns, pots raining from the sky.

events.title: Freedom — or the Iron Fist
events.text: Many win their freedom and leave Exile behind. Those who remain fall under the Mistress's justice.

seasons.name: Hindafjall — Erik's Reign
seasons.tagline: Erik blames the Exiles for the docks and marches on Shem.

events.title: The Invasion of Shem Begins
events.text: Stygian sorcerers seal Shem's borders; Erik drills the Exiles for the coming war.

events.title: Chiefdoms Declared
events.text: Erik's kingdom system replaces the old Nexus battles — claim, raid, and hold up to 12 territories.

events.title: Goat Tokens
events.text: IC stipends paid to Erik's soldiers, spendable on unique rewards.

seasons.name: Hindafjall — The Wall Falls
seasons.tagline: The Cursed Wall falls and Erik seizes the throne from the exhausted Witch Queen.

events.title: The Wall Falls
events.text: The Cursed Wall is destroyed; only Hathor Ka's intervention saves everyone in the Lands.

events.title: Erik Seizes Sepermeru
events.text: With the Witch Queen bedridden, the Vanir horde invades and deposes the Sultan.

events.title: Thanes & the Nexus
events.text: Viceroy contests for the Nexus fortress begin.

seasons.name: Sepermeru — City of Relic Hunters
seasons.tagline: Hathor Ka raids the Temple of the Eye for power over the Green Wall.

events.title: The Temple of the Eye
events.text: Hathor Ka unearths a way to manipulate the Green Wall — the secret that dooms it next season.

events.title: The Silent Tower Opens
events.text: Conan's Tower of Iron, a four-floor cooperative trial, appears on the Isle of Women.

seasons.name: Sepermeru — The Spider Plague
seasons.tagline: A spider plague drives the Exiles from Murun to Sepermeru.

events.title: Flight from Murun
events.text: Frenzied spiders force the Exiles to flee; the Savage Wilds are sealed off behind them.

events.title: World Events Become Repeatable
events.text: Quests open to every Exile — the system that still runs today.

seasons.name: Murun — Hathor Ka's Conscription
seasons.tagline: The Witch Queen frees the Exiles from the Sultan — into her own army.

events.title: Conscription
events.text: Hathor Ka frees the Exiles from their obligation to the Sultan, binding them instead to her war.

events.title: There Will Be Spiders
events.text: A new/old power stirs in the sealed map — the seed of the coming plague.

seasons.name: Murun — City of the Sultan
seasons.tagline: Murun rises under Sultan Mehemed and his guard.

events.title: The Sultan's Court
events.text: The Turanian city of Murun becomes the hub under Sultan Mehemed.

events.title: The Prey System
events.text: Bounties from the Sultan turn marked Exiles into hunted quarry.

seasons.name: Wulfgard — Erik's Betrayal
seasons.tagline: Erik betrays Lasho and plunders everything the Exiles built.

events.title: Erik's Betrayal
events.text: The Vanir betrays Lasho, raiding the Lands to the last brick to pay his mercenaries and debts.

events.title: The Black Lotus Thief
events.text: Artefacts vanish from Erik's vault, leaving only wet footprints and a single black lotus.

seasons.name: Muriela's Deceit — The Dafari Ate the Moon
seasons.tagline: Lasho rules as the Dafari try to devour the Moon.

events.title: The Dafari Eat the Moon
events.text: Prophet Zul Face-Eater unites the savage tribes to sacrifice Exiles to Zul'Vathgor.

events.title: The Summoning Thwarted
events.text: Exiles storm the Summoning Place; the backlash erupts in volcanoes and quakes.

events.title: World Events Introduced
events.text: The quest and Point-of-Interest system debuts on Thrall Wars.

seasons.name: Muriela's Deceit — The Rise of Lasho
seasons.tagline: A second cataclysm cleanses the Lands, and the Zamoran rises.

events.title: The Red Keep Falls
events.text: A summoned monstrosity tears the Red Keep apart, triggering the second cataclysm.

events.title: The Rise of Lasho
events.text: A Zamoran crime syndicate seizes the power vacuum, 'rescuing' the dying into servitude.
